name: Appetizer Crab Balls
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the crab meat, bread crumbs, beaten egg, cocktail sauce, mayonnaise, green onion, parsley, mustard powder, salt, and black pepper.
2. Cover and chill for at least 1 hour.
3. Form the mixture into 36 balls using a rounded teaspoon for each.
4. Roll each ball in crushed chips.
5. Place the balls on a baking sheet.
6. Bake in a preheated oven at 425°F (220°C) for 10 to 12 minutes, or until hot and golden brown.
7. Serve immediately with additional cocktail sauce for dipping.
